title: Saeima to consider grooming risk limiting rules
summary_full: On Thursday, the Saeima referred to the Human Rights and Public Affairs Committee for review amendments to the Child Protection Law prepared by the Progressives parliamentary faction, which would prohibit adults in positions of authority from engaging in intimate relationships with young people aged 16 to 18.
